{{Quote|By aiding him, you have only weakened him. He was at a moment of crisis, a moment of indecision; it is those internal struggles, when they are fought and won, that yield the strongest rewards. You took that battle from him, cheapened it. If he truly loved her, truly, he would have entered the Refugee Sector on his own—damn the Exchange, damn everything in his path and taken her. You have made their union easier, not better.|[[Kreia]] criticises Surik about her handling of Lootra's situation|<ref name="KotOR II">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
The '''Refugee Sector''' was an area on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] delegated to millions of [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] from the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was mostly a construct of cargo containers and prefabricated structures. The conditions were horrendous and the refugees were ruled over by brutal [[Serroco (gang)|Serroco]] thugs and the [[Exchange]]. [[Saquesh]] of the [[Exchange]] planned to break the will of the Refugees, and then sell them to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] as slaves on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] below.<ref name="KotOR II" />

When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|Exile]] [[Meetra Surik]] came to Nar Shaddaa in search of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]], she visited the Refugee Quad, and was stunned to see how the Refugees were surviving. She decided to help the Refugees by curing [[Geriel]] of a deadly plague, helping [[Nadaa]] free her daughter [[Adana (Human)|Adana]], find a job for [[Odis]] as a pilot, help [[Aaida]] escape the Refugee Quad and reunite with her husband [[Lootra]], help [[Kahranna]] find a ship to [[Telos IV|Telos]], and help [[Hussef]] to stop the Exchange and the Serroco from bullying the refugees. Thus, though the refugees did continue to exist on a shoelace, their conditions improved greatly. As a result, the Exile became very notorious in the eyes of the Exchange. While in the Refugee Sector, a pair of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] told the Exile the true nature of her companion, [[Atton Rand]], and after Atton revealed to her more about his past, the Exile agreed to train Atton as a [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinel]].<ref name="KotOR II" />

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chooses the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] path, the Exile can instead help the Exchange further break the will of the Refugees.<ref name="KotOR II" />
